# TP Dumpsters - Bay Area Dumpster Rental Service

> TP Dumpsters provides affordable dumpster rental services across the San Francisco Bay Area, California.

## About
- Company: TP Dumpsters
- Website: https://tpdumpsters.com
- Phone: (510) 650-2083
- Email: dumpster@tpservicesca.com
- Service Area: San Francisco Bay Area, California
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Services
- 10 Yard Dumpster Rental ($600, 7 days, 1 ton) — ideal for small cleanups and heavy materials
- 20 Yard Dumpster Rental ($650, 7 days, 2 tons) — perfect for remodels and medium projects
- 30 Yard Dumpster Rental ($750, 7 days, 3 tons) — large renovations and construction
- Clean Soil Disposal ($600, 10yd, 3 days, no weight limit)
- Clean Concrete Disposal ($600, 10yd, 3 days, no weight limit)
- Mixed Materials ($750, 10yd, 3 days, no weight limit)
- Same-day delivery available
- Online booking with instant pricing
- Bilingual support (English & Spanish)

## Service Areas
We serve the entire San Francisco Bay Area including:

### Alameda County
Oakland, Berkeley, Fremont, Hayward, Alameda, San Leandro, Livermore, Pleasanton, Dublin, Newark, Union City, Castro Valley

### Contra Costa County
Concord, Walnut Creek, Richmond, Pinole, Antioch, Brentwood, Pittsburg, Martinez, Lafayette, San Ramon, Danville, Pleasant Hill, Hercules, El Cerrito, Oakley, Orinda, Moraga, Bay Point, El Sobrante, San Pablo

### Solano County
Vallejo, Benicia, American Canyon

### San Francisco County
San Francisco

### Santa Clara County
San Jose

## Pricing Highlights
- Transparent pricing — no hidden fees
- 5% online booking discount
- Extra days: $49/day
- Overweight: $125/ton prorated
- Cancellation: $150 fee, 24h notice required
- Payment: Credit card online or Zelle
